ETNG Action Alert -- EFF 2/22/2026


Notice Text:

In order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, ETNG is issuing an Action Alert pursuant to Section 14.6 of the General Terms and Conditions of ETNG's FERC Gas Tariff effective 9:00 AM CCT, February 22, 2026 for all LMSMA and LMSPA parties.

This Action Alert does not affect the ability of ETNG to receive or deliver quantities of gas for scheduled nominations to any customer, storage field, or pipeline.

During the effectiveness of this Action Alert, balancing parties under Rate Schedules LMSMA and LMSPA must be balanced such that actual deliveries of gas out of the system must be equal to or less than scheduled deliveries out of the system and actual receipts of gas into the system must be equal to or greater than scheduled receipts into the system.


The penalty provisions under Section 47.5(b) of the General Terms and Conditions of ETNG's FERC Gas Tariff shall apply for failure to conform for each dekatherm of actual receipt quantities that are less than scheduled receipt quantities and for each dekatherm of actual delivery quantities that are greater than scheduled delivery quantities, in each case with a tolerance of 10% of scheduled quantities or 500 dekatherms (whichever is greater).

 

The penalty will be subject to $0.98 plus an index price based on the arithmetic average of the High Common prices published in Gas Daily's "Daily Price Survey" for "Transco, zone 5 del." and "Tennessee, 500 Leg" for the day the violation occurred for each Dekatherm of gas by which it deviated from the requirements of the Action Alert. In addition, ETNG will not permit retroactive nominations to avoid an Action Alert penalty.

This Action Alert will remain in effect until further notice.


Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.

 

Please refer to the table below for the effected ETNG operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages.

Operational Areas

Gas Day February 19 - February 21

Gas Day February 22 and until further notice

System Wide

No OFO/No Action Alert

Action Alert in Effect:
No Due Pipe Action Alert 10% / 500

 

 

NOTE:

Deliveries No DP: Shippers are not to take more than scheduled

Deliveries No DS: Shippers are not to take less than scheduled

Receipts No DP: Shippers are not to give less than scheduled

Receipts No DS: Shippers are not to give more than scheduled
